overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a medieval harbor town during golden hour. The character walks through cobblestone streets past a large water wheel, approaches the waterfront, and continues along wooden docks while NPC townsfolk go about their activities.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval harbor town square with water wheel

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the town square with sword on back, passing market stalls

notable_agents.action: child in yellow dress running across the cobblestones
townsfolk walking near the large wooden water wheel

entered.detail: blue and gray stone building with arched wooden doorway and timber framing
large wooden water wheel structure with buckets near the waterfront
thatched roof wooden stall with hanging goods
wooden barrels stacked against building wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a medieval harbor town square with cobblestone ground. A large wooden water wheel dominates the left side while stone buildings line the right. Various NPCs including children and townsfolk move about the square.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy waterfront promenade with harbor view

events.description: moving from cobblestone square to sandy waterfront area near the water
character turns around near the water's edge to walk along the shore

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaches the waterfront, pauses near the water, then turns to walk along the shoreline

notable_agents.action: armored guard in helmet walking past the character
group of children playing near the water's edge

entered.detail: calm blue water of the harbor with gentle ripples
wooden pier structure extending into the harbor
small yellow rowboat floating in the water
snow-capped mountains visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to the waterfront as Geralt moves from cobblestones to sandy ground. The harbor water stretches to the left with a small boat visible, while mountains rise in the distance. The character turns near the water and continues along the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden boardwalk along harbor with cargo

events.description: moving from open waterfront to covered wooden dock area with awnings
large wooden support beam and canvas awning temporarily block the view

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the wooden dock passing workers and townsfolk under canvas awnings

notable_agents.action: worker in simple clothes carrying a wooden crate
child sitting on the edge of the wooden dock

entered.detail: large wooden building with vertical planks and loading area
large canvas sail-like canopy providing shade over the walkway
large wooden sailing ship with mast docked at the harbor
sprawling medieval city with towers visible on green hillside across water

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a wooden dock walkway partially covered by canvas awnings. The ground is wooden planks rather than stone. To the right is a large wooden warehouse with workers moving cargo, while to the left the harbor opens up showing a distant hillside town.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront with panoramic view of distant city

events.description: strong sun glare and backlighting as camera faces into the setting sun

agents.ego_description: Geralt pausing to look at the distant cityscape while walking along the sunlit dock

notable_agents.action: armored guard walking toward the camera along the dock

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peaks silhouetted against the bright sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows an open waterfront view with strong golden hour backlighting creating a warm glow. The wooden dock continues along the water with the distant hillside town now more prominent. Mountains frame the left side as the sun shines directly toward the camera.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling medieval harbor town that gradually opens into a wide, sun-drenched waterfront. It begins in a cobblestone square dominated by a large wooden water wheel and stone buildings, moving past children and townsfolk. As the character advances, the cobblestones transition into sandy ground, opening the view to the harbor water and distant mountains before the camera turns to follow the shoreline. The scene then shifts onto a wooden dock walkway sheltered by canvas awnings, passing a warehouse where workers move cargo while a hillside town emerges in the distance. Finally, the path opens into a broad waterfront vista where strong golden hour backlighting creates a warm glow, framing the distant town and mountains against the direct light of the sun.
